text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The days pass by in the blink of an eye as I train
with <chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon enough...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Salutations! I have wonderful news!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your trainee has achieved such renown for her
performance that...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! You have earned a place in the
URA Finale!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Please! I'm the one who should be thankful!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I set you the task of raising a star Umamusume,
and suffice to say...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Spectacular! You have delivered exactly what I
hoped for!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Without a doubt, the crowd will go wild for such a
captivating Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The URA Finale is set to become a stage of
dreams that everyone can enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Gold star! You have exceeded my expectations
and then some!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I anticipate a racecourse full of deafening cheers
and raucous applause!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
With your trainee in the running, the event is
guaranteed to be a success!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, and one more thing.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Without your help, we would never have made it
this far.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You called for help, and the good people of this
school and town answered.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The turf we grew is now set to sway in the breeze
on the URA Finale course!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Appreciation! Gratitude! You have my deepest
thanks!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Now then... The URA Finale is just around the
corner! I hope to see some spectacular races!
choice_data_list: We'll make it an event to remember!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! Make yourself a beacon that future
Umamusume can look to for guidance!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations,
Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We'll be participating too. We've actually just
gotten the news.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Yay.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Meek and I are going to take the crown.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And... I'm going to grow much more as a trainer!
Even more than you!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I don't just want to look up to you anymore. I
want to stand alongside you.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: You can do it... We can do it.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
...I won't lose. Not to you, and not to your
trainee.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Because I have the best trainer in the world...
Wow.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you, Meek.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
All right,
Trainer <username>!
Let's make our trainees shine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, it's official—we're going to run with the
best of the best in the URA Finale!
